attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  RANK() OVER(ORDER BY DIST.GL_DATE , COALESCE(ENGLA_CRDT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995),
     COALESCE(ENGLA_DBT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) ,DIST.OA_ATTRIB_ID,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS)  
  + SDCAKEY.MAX_VAL AS MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
, DIST.GL_DATE   AS GL_DT 
, COALESCE(ENGLA_CRDT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS  CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
, COALESCE(ENGLA_DBT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS   DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
, COALESCE(DIST.OA_ATTRIB_ID,-999)  AS OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT  
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
, DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS AS ACCT_CLASS_CD      
, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
, USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CG_MERK_DIST_ALL DIST 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA_DBT 
ON (ENGLA_DBT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.DEBIT_CCID 
AND ENGLA_DBT.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG')  
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA_CRDT 
ON (ENGLA_CRDT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.CREDIT_CCID  
AND ENGLA_CRDT.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG')  
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL  
ON NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = DIST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
AND NATL.SS_CODE = 'CG' 
INNER JOIN ( SELECT  COALESCE(MAX(SMART.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY),0) MAX_VAL  
   FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX SMART  ) SDCAKEY ON 1 = 1 
WHERE DIST.RETRO_FLAG='N' /* ADDED for DEC2020 scope*/
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX SMART   
    WHERE NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SMART.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
    AND DIST.GL_DATE = SMART.GL_DT
    AND COALESCE(DIST.OA_ATTRIB_ID,-999) = SMART.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT 
    AND ENGLA_CRDT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = SMART.CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY 
    AND ENGLA_DBT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY =  SMART.DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
    AND DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS = SMART.ACCT_CLASS_CD
	AND SMART.RETRO_FLG='N'
 )

SELECT  RANK() OVER(ORDER BY DIST.GL_DT ,DIST.CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY ,DIST.DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY ,
DIST.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT ,DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,DIST.ACCT_CLASS_CD )  
		+ SDCAKEY.MAX_VAL AS MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY            
, DIST.GL_DT                         
, DIST.CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
, DIST.DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY 
, DIST.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT              
, DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
, DIST.ACCT_CLASS_CD                      
, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
, USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CG_MERAKI_DIST_ALL_RTBL_OA DIST 
INNER JOIN ( SELECT  COALESCE(MAX(SMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY),0) MAX_VAL  
			FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX SMRT  ) SDCAKEY ON 1 = 1 
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX SMRT 
				WHERE DIST.GL_DT = SMRT.GL_DT
				AND DIST.CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY = SMRT.CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY 
                AND DIST.DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY =  SMRT.DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
				AND DIST.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT = SMRT.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT 
				AND DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SMRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
				AND DIST.ACCT_CLASS_CD = SMRT.ACCT_CLASS_CD)

SELECT
SMART.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY            ,
NATL.AR_TRX_KEY AS AR_TRX_KEY,                
NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,               
COALESCE(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,          
RFMTY.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE  AS BK_GL_TRX_FSCL_CAL_CD , 
RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AS BK_GL_TRX_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT,
RFMTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS BK_GL_TRX_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT,    
CASE WHEN DIST.OA_FLAG='N' THEN  COALESCE (NP_PAR.ITEM_KEY,-999)   
ELSE COALESCE (NP.ITEM_KEY,  -999)  END AS PRODUCT_KEY, 
COALESCE(ENGLA_CREDIT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY,  
COALESCE(ENGLA_DEBIT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS  DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY,                 
COALESCE (CAST(DIST.GL_DATE AS DATE) , DATE '3500-01-01') AS  GL_DT,
COALESCE (DIST.TRX_CURR_CODE, 'UNK') AS BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD,   
COALESCE (DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS , 'UNKNOWN' )AS ACCT_CLASS_CD,       
CASE WHEN DIST.OA_FLAG='N' THEN DIST.QUANTITY ELSE DIST.OA_QUANTITY END AS MERAKI_TRX_QTY,  
DIST.DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE AS CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD,                 
COALESCE(CAST(DIST.GL_TRANSFER_DATE AS DATE),DATE '3500-01-01') GL_POSTED_DT,          
/*COALESCE (NP_PAR.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS  DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY,                */
NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY,
COALESCE(DIST.OA_ATTRIB_ID,-999) AS OFFER_ATTR_ID_INT,       
CASE WHEN DIST.OA_ATTRIB_ID IS NULL THEN 'STANDALONE' ELSE 'ATTRIBUTED' END AS ATTRIBUTION_CD   ,                           
'CG' AS SS_CD,
COALESCE(DIST.CREDIT_AMOUNT,0) AS CREDIT_TRXL_AMT    , 
COALESCE(DIST.CREDIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT,0) AS CREDIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,     
COALESCE(DIST.DEBIT_AMOUNT,0) AS DEBIT_TRXL_AMT  ,                         
COALESCE(DIST.DEBIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT,0) AS DEBIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,  
DIST.FISCAL_PERIOD_NUMBER AS DV_FISCAL_MTH_YR_NUM_INT,           
CASE WHEN DIST.OA_FLAG='N' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ELSE DIST.OA_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,  
DIST.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE AS REV_RECOGNIZED_FLG,            
CASE WHEN DIST.OA_FLAG='Y' THEN DIST.OA_SEQUENCE_ID ELSE DIST.SEQUENCE_ID END AS SEQUENCE_ID,           
CASE WHEN DIST.OA_FLAG='N' THEN CAST(100 AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE DIST.OA_PERCENTAGE END AS OFFR_ATTR_PCT,
DIST.APPLICATION_NAME AS BUSINESS_APPLICATION_NAME,                  
CASE WHEN DIST.OA_FLAG='N' THEN DIST.CLAIM_START_DATE ELSE DIST.OA_CLAIM_START_DATE END AS CLAIM_START_DT,  
CASE WHEN DIST.OA_FLAG='N' THEN DIST.CLAIM_END_DATE ELSE DIST.OA_CLAIM_END_DATE END AS CLAIM_END_DT,   
CASE WHEN DIST.OA_FLAG='N' THEN 
          CASE WHEN COALESCE(DIST.AMOUNT,0)=0 THEN CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))
          ELSE CAST((ABS((COALESCE(DIST.DEBIT_AMOUNT,0)+COALESCE(DIST.CREDIT_AMOUNT,0))/DIST.AMOUNT)*100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) END
     WHEN DIST.OA_FLAG='Y' THEN
	      CASE WHEN COALESCE(DIST.AMOUNT*DIST.OA_PERCENTAGE,0)=0 THEN CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))
	      ELSE CAST((ABS((COALESCE(DIST.DEBIT_AMOUNT,0)+COALESCE(DIST.CREDIT_AMOUNT,0))/(DIST.AMOUNT*DIST.OA_PERCENTAGE/100)*100)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) END
	 ELSE 0.000000
	 END AS TRXL_LINE_PCT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM ,               
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,              
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,                
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE(DIST.RETRO_FLAG,'N') AS RETRO_FLG,/* ADDED FRO DEC2020 RELEASE*/
COALESCE(DIST.RECLAIM_VERSION,-999) AS RECLAIM_VER_NUM_INT,/* ADDED FRO DEC2020 RELEASE*/
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
CASE WHEN NMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END DML_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CG_MERK_DIST_ALL DIST 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA_DEBIT  ON (ENGLA_DEBIT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.DEBIT_CCID 
 AND ENGLA_DEBIT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')  
 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA_CREDIT ON (ENGLA_CREDIT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.CREDIT_CCID 
 AND ENGLA_CREDIT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')  
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL 
      ON NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT=DIST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  AND NATL.SS_CODE='CG' 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL  ON (NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = DIST.ORDER_LINE_ID
  AND NSOL.SS_CODE='CG')
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP_PAR ON(DIST.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID =NP_PAR.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT) /*inner join bcoz both top and sub will have information*/
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP ON(DIST.OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID =NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT) /*left outer join bcoz only subsku will have info.*/
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC  ON(EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = DIST.ORG_ID)      
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB  ON NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = DIST.LEDGER_ID AND NSOB.SS_CODE='CG'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  RFMTY ON (DIST.FISCAL_PERIOD_NUMBER =  RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT) 
 AND CAST(DIST.GL_DATE AS DATE) <= RFMTY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE   

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX SMART ON (
SMART.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 AND SMART.GL_DT = DIST.GL_DATE 
 AND SMART.DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY  = ENGLA_DEBIT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
 AND SMART.CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY  = ENGLA_CREDIT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
  AND SMART.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT = COALESCE(DIST.OA_ATTRIB_ID,-999)
 AND SMART.ACCT_CLASS_CD = DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS )
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX NMRT
 ON SMART.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY=NMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
 where 1=2

SELECT
SMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY  AS   MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY,
DIST.AR_TRX_KEY AS AR_TRX_KEY,                
DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,               
DIST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,          
RFDTY.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE  AS BK_GL_TRX_FSCL_CAL_CD , 
RFDTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AS BK_GL_TRX_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT,
RFDTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS BK_GL_TRX_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT,    
DIST.PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY, 
DIST.CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY AS CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY,  
DIST.DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY AS  DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY,                 
COALESCE (CAST(DIST.GL_DT AS DATE) , DATE '3500-01-01') AS  GL_DT,
COALESCE (DIST.CURRENCY, 'UNK') AS BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD,   
COALESCE (DIST.ACCT_CLASS_CD , 'UNKNOWN' )AS ACCT_CLASS_CD,       
DIST.QUANTITY AS MERAKI_TRX_QTY,  
DIST.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE AS CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD,                 
COALESCE(CAST(DIST.GL_POSTED_DT AS DATE),DATE '3500-01-01') GL_POSTED_DT,          
DIST.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY AS  DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY,                
DIST.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT AS OFFER_ATTR_ID_INT,       
'ATTRIBUTED' AS ATTRIBUTION_CD   ,                           
'CG' AS SS_CD,
CASE WHEN DIST.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE = 'CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(DIST.SUB_SKU_AMOUNT,0.0000) ELSE 0.00000 END AS CREDIT_TRXL_AMT  
,CASE WHEN DIST.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE = 'CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(DIST.SUB_SKU_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT,0.0000) ELSE 0.00000 END AS CREDIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT    
,CASE WHEN DIST.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE = 'DEBIT' THEN COALESCE(DIST.SUB_SKU_AMOUNT,0.0000) ELSE 0.00000 END AS DEBIT_TRXL_AMT  
,CASE WHEN DIST.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE = 'DEBIT' THEN COALESCE(DIST.SUB_SKU_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT,0.0000) ELSE 0.00000 END AS DEBIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  
,((RFDTY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100)+(RFDTY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT)) AS DV_FISCAL_MTH_YR_NUM_INT,           
DIST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,  
CASE WHEN  COALESCE(CAST(DIST.GL_POSTED_DT AS DATE), DATE '3500-01-01'  ) ='3500-01-01' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END   REV_RECOGNIZED_FLG,          
DIST.SEQUENCE_ID AS SEQUENCE_ID,           
DIST.OA_PERCENTAGE AS OFFR_ATTR_PCT,
DIST.APPLICATION_NAME AS BUSINESS_APPLICATION_NAME,                  
NATIL.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE AS CLAIM_START_DT,  
NATIL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT AS CLAIM_END_DT,   
CAST(100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) TRXL_LINE_PCT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM ,               
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,              
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,                
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
CASE WHEN NMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END DML_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CG_MERAKI_DIST_ALL_RTBL_OA DIST 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL ON DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWdb.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR  RFDTY ON CAST(DIST.GL_DT AS DATE) = RFDTY.CALENDAR_DATE   
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX SMRT ON (
                    DIST.GL_DT = SMRT.GL_DT
				AND DIST.CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY = SMRT.CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY 
                AND DIST.DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY =  SMRT.DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
				AND DIST.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT = SMRT.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT 
				AND DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SMRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
				AND DIST.ACCT_CLASS_CD = SMRT.ACCT_CLASS_CD )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX NMRT
 ON SMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY=NMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY

SELECT  RANK() OVER(ORDER BY DIST.GL_DATE , COALESCE(ENGLA_CRDT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995),
     COALESCE(ENGLA_DBT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) ,DIST.OA_ATTRIB_ID,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS,RECLAIM_VER_NUM_INT)  
  + SDCAKEY.MAX_VAL AS MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
, DIST.GL_DATE   AS GL_DT 
, COALESCE(ENGLA_CRDT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS  CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
, COALESCE(ENGLA_DBT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS   DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
, COALESCE(DIST.OA_ATTRIB_ID,-999)  AS OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT  
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
, DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS AS ACCT_CLASS_CD    
,DIST.RETRO_FLAG /*ADDED FOR DEC2020 SCOPE*/
,DIST.RECLAIM_VERSION  /*ADDED FOR DEC2020 SCOPE*/
, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
, USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CG_MERK_DIST_ALL DIST 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA_DBT 
ON (ENGLA_DBT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.DEBIT_CCID 
AND ENGLA_DBT.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG')  
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA_CRDT 
ON (ENGLA_CRDT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.CREDIT_CCID  
AND ENGLA_CRDT.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG')  
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL  
ON NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = DIST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
AND NATL.SS_CODE = 'CG' 
INNER JOIN ( SELECT  COALESCE(MAX(SMART.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY),0) MAX_VAL  
   FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX SMART  ) SDCAKEY ON 1 = 1 
WHERE DIST.RETRO_FLAG='Y' /* ADDED for DEC2020 scope*/
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX SMART   
    WHERE NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SMART.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
    AND DIST.GL_DATE = SMART.GL_DT
    AND COALESCE(DIST.OA_ATTRIB_ID,-999) = SMART.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT 
    AND ENGLA_CRDT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = SMART.CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY 
    AND ENGLA_DBT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY =  SMART.DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
    AND DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS = SMART.ACCT_CLASS_CD
	AND DIST.RECLAIM_VERSION=SMART.RECLAIM_VER_NUM_INT
	AND SMART.RETRO_FLG='Y'
 )
